'''manaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mccrillisite|mccrillisite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mccrillisite|mccrillisite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| manaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mænæzæth|mænæzæth]] || [[word:mænæzæj|mænæzæj]] || [[word:mænæzæsh|mænæzæsh]] || [[word:mænæzæ|mænæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mananazath|mananazath]] || [[word:mananazaj|mananazaj]] || [[word:mananazash|mananazash]] || [[word:mananaza|mananaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:manazath|manazath]] || [[word:manazaj|manazaj]] || [[word:manazash|manazash]] || [[word:manaza|manaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:manafzath|manafzath]] || [[word:manafzaj|manafzaj]] || [[word:manafzash|manafzash]] || [[word:manafzaf|manafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:manazatha|manazatha]] || [[word:manazaja|manazaja]] || [[word:manazasha|manazasha]] || [[word:manazaka|manazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:manazath|manazath]] || [[word:manazaj|manazaj]] || [[word:manazash|manazash]] || [[word:manaza|manaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:manazathal|manazathal]] || [[word:manazajal|manazajal]] || [[word:manazashal|manazashal]] || [[word:manazakal|manazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:manazathatha|manazathatha]] || [[word:manazajaja|manazajaja]] || [[word:manazashasha|manazashasha]] || [[word:manazaka|manazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:manazathan|manazathan]] || [[word:manazajan|manazajan]] || [[word:manazashan|manazashan]] || [[word:manazakan|manazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:manazathaoro|manazathaoro]] || [[word:manazajaoro|manazajaoro]] || [[word:manazashaoro|manazashaoro]] || [[word:manazakaoro|manazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
